name: High Churn Risk — 70%+ Threshold
description: Members whose Einstein churn probability crossed 70% this week
defining_rules: Score crossed threshold in last 7 days

name: Digital Dormant — No Login 90+ Days
description: Members with zero digital interactions across all channels in 90+ days
defining_rules: No web, mobile, or IVR login in 90+ days

name: Military Retirees — NPS Decline
description: Military retiree members with NPS decline of 10+ points in 6 months

key_characteristics.primary_driver: CD rate transparency, loyalty recognition gap
